description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a slender build, standing upright with both arms raised high above the head in a V-shape. The person is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, paired with closed-toe shoes. The figure's hair is medium-length and styled to fall just above the shoulders, with a center part. The facial features are neutral, and the body posture is symmetrical, suggesting a static pose. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall appearance is casual and suitable for an urban environment.
description: An adult pedestrian standing upright with arms raised in a V-shape, wearing a sleeveless top, straight pants, and closed-toe shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, sleeveless top, and both arms raised in a V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm extended upward, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and both arms raised behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the arm extended upward, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised in a V-shape
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with a center part
